title: Mommies Group
overview: A school WhatsApp group brings together three mothers from three different social classes, where Maryam and Nadia aren't getting along with their children, so the former Miss Egypt decides to help them bring them closer to their children, as she is a kind, cheerful mother who lacks discipline.
